name: python3-tsk
title: python3-tsk
summary: Python Bindings for The Sleuth Kit
description:
Python Bindings for The Sleuth Kit
This package contains Python 3 bindings to libtsk3, the shared library
that provides all the functionality of The Sleuth Kit.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-tsk because Python Bindings for The Sleuth Kit.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-tsk as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-tsk with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-tsk --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
